00030 #include <types.h>
00031 #include <kern/errno.h>
00032 #include <lib.h>
00033 /*#include <lamebus/lnet.h>*/ /* not yet */
00034 #include "autoconf.h"
00035 
00036 int
00037 config_lnet(struct lnet_softc *sc, int lnetno)
00038 {
00039         (void)sc;
00040         
00041         kprintf("lnet%d: No network support in system\n", lnetno);
00042 
00043         return ENODEV;
00044 }
